---
title: "Project2"
output: html_document
---

# Monte Carlo Feature Selection

Identify the set of relevant features that would be used for classification

```{r}


```

# R.ROSETTA Basic Unit Test

Create and train a rule-based model with the selected features 

```{r}


```

# Optimize Model Parmeters

Refine the rule-based model based on empirical results

```{r}


```

# Visualization

Visualize rules (heatmaps, boxplots, VisuNet, VisuArc)

```{r}


```
